title: image in a dashboard
excerpt: Hello, I would like to know if it is possible to display an image in a dashboard, and if so, how can it be done?

posts.author: jerem (Jeremy TETEREL)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello, I would like to know if it is possible to display an image in a dashboard, and if so, how can it be done?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Jeremy,

You can use the embed everything widget to embed links (including images) into your dashboard! Could this work for you?

posts.author: jerem (Jeremy TETEREL)
posts.cookedHtml:
thank you for your feedback BIANCA, can you show me an example please? and on which service do you host your image? because I have this error :

image2430×1042 82.3 KB

posts.author: Nachliel (Nachliel from Easyapps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @jerem

Nachliel from Easyapps here

Our monday app Universal Embedder , Allows you to embed public URLs (Including from postimg) in your monday Dashboards, Boards, and items

You can contact us at support@easyappshq.com, and we also provide free training sessions if you need one.

Here is an example of embedding a PDF hosted in Google Drive in a Dashboard:

Nachliel

posts.author: dnmonday (Desmond)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Bianca, with this note on the widget page, is there a plan/feature being built into the dashboards to replace the function of the widget?

image816×155 12.6 KB

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Desmond,

I am currently investigating this as I was also unaware of the deprecation! As soon as I have more information, I will update you asap

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @dnmonday - thanks so much for your patience with me (I’ve been OOO) and happy new year!

I can confirm that the Embed Everything Widget is not being deprecated and our knowledge base team will be removing this notice from the article! I apologise for the miscommunication and confusion caused - thanks for your understanding!
